name: GPT Researcher
description: Autonomous deep-research agent that plans queries, browses the web in parallel, and produces cited research reports in minutes. Supports API and MCP integration.

skills.name: Research Planning
skills.description: Decompose a research question into parallel sub-queries for comprehensive web coverage

skills.name: Parallel Browsing
skills.description: Browse multiple sources simultaneously and extract relevant content for synthesis

skills.name: Report Generation
skills.description: Produce structured, cited research reports in markdown with sources and inline references

skills.name: Source Filtering
skills.description: Filter and rank sources by relevance, recency, and credibility before including in report

skills.name: MCP Tool
skills.description: Expose the deep-research workflow as an MCP tool for use inside Claude and other agents
